testcase.name: Authentication E2E Tests › Login Page › should display login form with required fields
Authentication E2E Tests › Login Page › should show validation error for empty credentials
Authentication E2E Tests › Login Page › should show error for invalid credentials
Authentication E2E Tests › Login Page › should login successfully with valid credentials

failure.message: auth.e2e.test.ts:81:5 should login successfully with valid credentials

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › auth/auth.e2e.test.ts:81:5 › Authentication E2E Tests › Login Page › should login successfully with valid credentials
TimeoutError: page.waitForURL: Timeout 10000ms exceeded. =========================== logs =========================== waiting for navigation to "/" until "load" ============================================================
81 | 82 | // Should redirect to dashboard > 83 | await page.waitForURL('/', { timeout: 10000 }); | ^ 84 | 85 | // Should show dashboard 86 | await expect(page.getByRole('heading', { name: 'Dashboard' })).toBeVisible(); at /home/jussi/Development/viberator/tests/e2e/tests/auth/auth.e2e.test.ts:83:18
attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../test-results/auth-auth.e2e-Authenticati-282c1-ully-with-valid-credentials-chromium/test-failed-1.png ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
attachment #2: video (video/webm) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../test-results/auth-auth.e2e-Authenticati-282c1-ully-with-valid-credentials-chromium/video.webm ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Error Context: ../test-results/auth-auth.e2e-Authenticati-282c1-ully-with-valid-credentials-chromium/error-context.md

testcase.name: Authentication E2E Tests › Login Page › should redirect to dashboard if already authenticated

failure.message: auth.e2e.test.ts:99:5 should redirect to dashboard if already authenticated

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › auth/auth.e2e.test.ts:99:5 › Authentication E2E Tests › Login Page › should redirect to dashboard if already authenticated
TimeoutError: page.waitForURL: Timeout 10000ms exceeded. =========================== logs =========================== waiting for navigation to "/" until "load" ============================================================
at ../playwright/fixtures.ts:44
42 | await page.fill('input[name="password"]', TEST_PASSWORD); 43 | await page.click('button[type="submit"]'); > 44 | await page.waitForURL('/', { timeout: 10000 }); | ^ 45 | await use(page); 46 | }, 47 | }); at Object.authenticatedPage (/home/jussi/Development/viberator/tests/e2e/playwright/fixtures.ts:44:16)
attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../test-results/auth-auth.e2e-Authenticati-cebca-rd-if-already-authenticated-chromium/test-failed-1.png ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
attachment #2: video (video/webm) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../test-results/auth-auth.e2e-Authenticati-cebca-rd-if-already-authenticated-chromium/video.webm ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

testcase.name: Authentication E2E Tests › Forgot Password › should display forgot password page
Authentication E2E Tests › Registration › should display registration form
Authentication E2E Tests › Session Management › should persist session across page navigations
Authentication E2E Tests › Protected Routes › should redirect unauthenticated users to login
Authentication E2E Tests › Protected Routes › should allow authenticated users to access protected routes
Authentication E2E Tests › SEC-1 to SEC-6: Authentication Security › SEC-1: should isolate user sessions
Clanker Management E2E Tests › C-1 to C-8: Clanker CRUD Operations › C-1: should create a new clanker
Clanker Management E2E Tests › C-1 to C-8: Clanker CRUD Operations › should display deployment strategy options
Clanker Management E2E Tests › C-1 to C-8: Clanker CRUD Operations › should display agent selection options
Clanker Management E2E Tests › C-1 to C-8: Clanker CRUD Operations › should allow selecting secrets for clanker
Clanker Management E2E Tests › C-1 to C-8: Clanker CRUD Operations › should allow adding config files
Clanker Management E2E Tests › Clanker List Page › should display list of clankers
Clanker Management E2E Tests › Clanker List Page › should show clanker status badges
Clanker Management E2E Tests › Clanker List Page › should have "New Clanker" button
Clanker Management E2E Tests › C-2 to C-6: Clanker Actions › C-2: should show start button for inactive clankers
Clanker Management E2E Tests › C-2 to C-6: Clanker Actions › C-6: should show stop button for active clankers
Clanker Management E2E Tests › C-2 to C-6: Clanker Actions › C-5: should show clanker health status
Clanker Management E2E Tests › Clanker Detail Page › should display clanker details
Clanker Management E2E Tests › Clanker Detail Page › should have edit button
Clanker Management E2E Tests › C-4: Deployment Strategies › should support Docker deployment
Clanker Management E2E Tests › C-4: Deployment Strategies › should support ECS deployment
Clanker Management E2E Tests › C-4: Deployment Strategies › should support Lambda deployment
Clanker Management E2E Tests › C-7, C-8: Secret Association › should allow associating secrets with clanker
Clanker Management E2E Tests › Clanker Status Display › should display correct status color
Clanker Management E2E Tests › Dashboard Clanker Section › should show clankers on dashboard
Integration Configuration E2E Tests › I-1 to I-6: Integration Management › I-1, I-5: should display integrations page
Integration Configuration E2E Tests › I-1 to I-6: Integration Management › should show integration cards for available integrations
Integration Configuration E2E Tests › I-1 to I-6: Integration Management › should use entity-scoped routes for configured integration cards
Integration Configuration E2E Tests › GitHub Integration Configuration › should auto-create GitHub integration from new route
Integration Configuration E2E Tests › GitHub Integration Configuration › should show GitHub webhook-first routing fields
Integration Configuration E2E Tests › GitHub Targeted Webhook UI › should render GitHub-specific inbound and outbound sections
Integration Configuration E2E Tests › GitHub Targeted Webhook UI › should allow configuring GitHub inbound events after creating inbound webhook
Integration Configuration E2E Tests › GitHub Targeted Webhook UI › should support selecting between multiple inbound GitHub configs
Integration Configuration E2E Tests › Jira Integration Configuration › should auto-create Jira integration from new route
Integration Configuration E2E Tests › Jira Targeted Webhook UI › should render Jira-specific inbound and outbound sections
Integration Configuration E2E Tests › Jira Targeted Webhook UI › should save Jira webhook settings and keep state after reload
Integration Configuration E2E Tests › Jira Targeted Webhook UI › should support selecting between multiple inbound Jira configs
Integration Configuration E2E Tests › Shortcut Targeted Webhook UI › should render Shortcut-specific inbound and outbound sections
Integration Configuration E2E Tests › Shortcut Targeted Webhook UI › should save Shortcut webhook settings and keep state after reload
Integration Configuration E2E Tests › Custom Targeted Webhook UI › should render custom inbound and outbound sections
Integration Configuration E2E Tests › Custom Targeted Webhook UI › should allow creating targeted custom inbound and outbound webhook configs
Integration Configuration E2E Tests › GitLab Integration Configuration › should display GitLab integration configuration page
Integration Configuration E2E Tests › I-3: Connection Testing › should have test connection button
Integration Configuration E2E Tests › Integration Status Indicators › should show configuration status for integrations
Integration Configuration E2E Tests › E2E Integration with External Services › should handle GitHub webhook payload (mocked)
Integration Configuration E2E Tests › E2E Integration with External Services › should validate webhook signature
Integration Configuration E2E Tests › Project Integration Linking › I-2: should allow linking integration to project
Integration Configuration E2E Tests › Third-Party Integration Mocking › should skip actual GitHub API calls in E2E tests
Integration Configuration E2E Tests › Third-Party Integration Mocking › should skip actual Jira API calls in E2E tests
Main End-to-End Flow (Mocked Infrastructure) › Setup: Create Integration and Project
Main End-to-End Flow (Mocked Infrastructure) › Step 1-7: Webhook Ingestion -> Platform Ticket Creation
Main End-to-End Flow (Mocked Infrastructure) › Step 8-15: Job Execution (Mock Worker)
Main End-to-End Flow (Mocked Infrastructure) › Step 16-18: Verify Feedback to Integration (Mock Server)
Project Management E2E Tests › P-1 to P-5: Project CRUD Operations › P-1: should create a new project
Project Management E2E Tests › P-1 to P-5: Project CRUD Operations › P-3: should enable auto-fix with tags
Project Management E2E Tests › P-1 to P-5: Project CRUD Operations › P-4: should handle project view and navigation
Project Management E2E Tests › Dashboard - Projects Section › UI-1, UI-2: should display dashboard with projects
Project Management E2E Tests › Dashboard - Projects Section › should show empty state when no projects exist
Project Management E2E Tests › Dashboard - Projects Section › should display project cards with correct information
Project Management E2E Tests › Project Settings › should access project settings page
Project Management E2E Tests › P-5: Duplicate slug prevention › should handle duplicate project names gracefully
Project Management E2E Tests › Multiple Repository URLs › P-2: should support multiple repository URLs
Secrets Management E2E Tests › S-1 to S-6: Secret CRUD Operations › S-1: should create a new secret
Secrets Management E2E Tests › S-1 to S-6: Secret CRUD Operations › S-2: should list all secrets with masked values
Secrets Management E2E Tests › S-1 to S-6: Secret CRUD Operations › S-3: should support different storage locations
Secrets Management E2E Tests › S-1 to S-6: Secret CRUD Operations › S-4: should support environment variable storage
Secrets Management E2E Tests › Secret Validation › should require secret name
Secrets Management E2E Tests › Secret Validation › should validate secret name format
Secrets Management E2E Tests › Secret Deletion › should allow deleting secrets
Secrets Management E2E Tests › Secret Deletion › should show confirmation dialog before deletion
Secrets Management E2E Tests › Secret Editing › should allow editing secret metadata
Secrets Management E2E Tests › S-6: Security - No credential logging › should not log secret values in console
Secrets Management E2E Tests › SSM Configuration › should allow SSM parameter path configuration
Secrets Management E2E Tests › Secret Badges › should display storage location badges
Secrets Management E2E Tests › Empty State › should show empty state when no secrets exist
Ticket Management E2E Tests › T-1 to T-6: Ticket CRUD Operations › T-1: should create a new ticket
Ticket Management E2E Tests › T-1 to T-6: Ticket CRUD Operations › T-2: should create ticket with screenshot
Ticket Management E2E Tests › T-1 to T-6: Ticket CRUD Operations › T-3: should create ticket with recording
Ticket Management E2E Tests › T-1 to T-6: Ticket CRUD Operations › T-4: should run ticket (create job)
Ticket Management E2E Tests › T-1 to T-6: Ticket CRUD Operations › T-6: should list tickets by project
Ticket Management E2E Tests › Ticket Detail Page › should display ticket details
Ticket Management E2E Tests › Ticket Detail Page › T-5: should display PR URL when available
Ticket Management E2E Tests › Ticket Severity and Category › should display severity badges
Ticket Management E2E Tests › Ticket Severity and Category › should allow selecting severity when creating ticket
Ticket Management E2E Tests › Ticket Validation › should require title and description
Ticket Management E2E Tests › Ticket List Filtering › should display ticket list with proper columns
Ticket Management E2E Tests › Manual Ticket Flow › should support complete manual ticket creation flow
Authentication E2E Tests › Login Page › should display login form with required fields
Authentication E2E Tests › Login Page › should show validation error for empty credentials
Authentication E2E Tests › Login Page › should show error for invalid credentials
Authentication E2E Tests › Login Page › should login successfully with valid credentials
